buildCommand: npx expo export --platform web && node scripts/inject-error-handler.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const v=require('./app.json').expo.version;const n=fs.existsSync('./release-notes.txt')?fs.readFileSync('./release-notes.txt','utf8').trim():'';fs.writeFileSync('dist/_v.json',JSON.stringify({b:Date.now(),v,n}))"
